specialists.why: The outline lacks details on network-level controls for URL fetching and administrative override capabilities.

items.text: Will the deployment environment implement network-level egress controls (e.g., restricting the parser from fetching internal/private IP addresses) to mitigate Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) risks?

Is there an administrative interface or 'kill-switch' planned that allows IT security teams to immediately suspend the service or disable specific parsers if a vulnerability or critical error is detected?

specialists.why: The storage location of the privacy threshold assessment and privacy impact assessment is a factual detail not provided in the project outline.

items.text: Where are the privacy threshold assessment and/or privacy impact assessment for the APS Markdown Conversion Service stored (e.g., specific document management system, case file, or other repository)?

specialists.why: The project outline lacks details regarding stakeholder engagement activities and the composition of the project team, which are critical to assessing compliance with consultation and diversity standards.

items.text: Has the project team conducted or scheduled formal consultations with representative APS end-users (including those who rely on assistive technologies) and agency IT security teams?

What is the current composition of the project design and development team, and does it include multidisciplinary roles such as accessibility specialists, user experience designers, and policy/legal officers?

specialists.why: To confirm whether accountability roles, legal clearances for web scraping, and accessibility compliance reviews have been established for this utility.

items.text: Has the agency designated an Accountable Official and an Accountable Use Case Owner for this utility under the Policy for the Responsible Use of AI in Government?
Has any legal advice been sought regarding potential copyright or intellectual property implications of converting third-party web content, and if so, where is it stored?
Have any accessibility or human rights reviews been conducted to ensure the Markdown outputs comply with the Disability Discrimination Act 1992?

specialists.why: To clarify recordkeeping and compliance arrangements for the system's development and governance lifecycle.

items.text: Will the agency establish a formal recordkeeping plan in an approved records management system to capture the system's design, development, and configuration records in accordance with AFDA Express?
options: Yes, a plan will be established
No, we will rely on GitHub history

specialists.why: The assessment requires clarification on testing, piloting, and monitoring plans to evaluate the reliability, safety, and operational readiness of the service.

items.text: Has any testing (such as security, reliability, or accessibility testing) been conducted on the deterministic parsing libraries or the web interface?
Do you plan to conduct a pilot of the Markdown conversion service with a limited group of APS users before full deployment?
What plans or mechanisms (e.g., logging, error rate tracking) will be established to monitor and evaluate the performance of the conversion service in production?
